rationale: A massive display of armored and air assets along the border will exploit Tethys’ war fatigue and project irresistible strength ahead of negotiations.
Continuous surveillance is essential to confirm enemy dispositions and exploit any weaknesses revealed by the recent cyber breach.
Large-scale drills on our territory will sharpen readiness and signal resolve to both allies and adversaries without crossing escalation thresholds.
Exploit confirmed war fatigue and the recent cyber breach by amplifying narratives of futility and division within Tethys’ public sphere to erode their will to fight.
Strengthen internal defenses against enemy infiltration following the intelligence leak, ensuring our operational security is not compromised in turn.
Deepen human and signals intelligence collection to assess the political stability of Tethys’ leadership amid rising dissent and verify battlefield intentions.
Precision sanctions on Tethys’ defense-industrial firms will deepen economic strain without triggering broad humanitarian fallout that could erode international support.
Seizing overseas assets of key Tethys military contractors amplifies financial pressure and signals resolve, complementing intelligence efforts to exploit their internal instability.

Controlled devaluation of our currency mitigates export losses from sanctions and boosts domestic production capacity, stabilizing our economic front during ongoing military and information operations.
A visible demonstration of our resolve and capability will exploit Novaris's current economic weakness and deter further aggression amid their logistical strain.
Strengthening border vigilance counters the risk of exploitation following the cyber breach and reassures a war-weary public of military control.
Proactive intelligence gathering is critical to anticipate Novaris’s next moves, especially as they adapt to our exposed plans and their own internal crises.
Strengthening our cyber defenses is critical to prevent further leaks and protect military operational integrity in light of the recent breach.
Proactive counterintelligence operations will disrupt Novaris’s ability to exploit stolen data and mitigate damage from the cyber intrusion.
A targeted information campaign will reinforce international perception of our legitimacy and exploit Novaris’s economic crisis to sway neutral states toward active support.
Precision sanctions on critical Novaris defense-sector allies will deepen their economic crisis without triggering broad retaliation that could fracture international support.
Seizing offshore assets of sanctioned Novaris officials undermines their war economy and signals resolve, complementing military and intelligence actions.
Direct economic support to bolster domestic resilience counters war fatigue and sustains public confidence amid prolonged sanctions exposure.

Leveraging our strong international support, we launch a high-profile diplomatic campaign to frame the conflict as a defense of global norms, reinforcing our moral authority amid the cyber breach fallout.
By institutionalizing peace efforts through neutral mediators, we capitalize on the proposed negotiation framework to stabilize diplomatic momentum and counter war fatigue at home.
Strengthening societal ties with Tethys reinforces alliance cohesion and projects unity, subtly signaling resolve to Novaris without direct confrontation.
